00:07:41	read.ai meeting notes:	Stefano added read.ai meeting notes to the meeting.

Read provides AI generated meeting summaries to make meetings more effective and efficient. View our Privacy Policy at https://www.read.ai/pp

Type "read stop" to disable, or "opt out" to delete meeting data.
00:09:25	Leopold Ajami:	I’m already a fan

00:34:18	Isto Felin:	Reacted to "Some might say the E..." with 👍
00:37:26	Paul Craven:	A/B Test for viewers of magician, Ben Earl performing magic:

Group 1: Watched the video with no introduction
Group 2: “The following magic trick is performed by magician, Ben Earl, one of the finest sleight-of-hand artists in the world. He is one of only four magicians with the skill required to perform this effect perfectly.”

Group 1: 33% wanted to see more of Ben’s magic

Group 2: 85% wanted to see more of Ben’s magic

(Source: Joshua Jay)
